title: A2A Task Response
description: Contract 3 — Agent-to-Agent task response message. `cost_usd` and `task_steps` are REQUIRED in all completed task responses (status=completed) — they back smoke-test assertions and audit-trail queries. `cost_usd` is computed by the LLMs gateway from per-provider token pricing.

task_id.description: UUID v4 echoing the request task_id.

schema_version.description: Semantic version of this contract schema, e.g. "1.0.0".

output.description: Task-type-specific output payload. Present on completed tasks.

error.description: Error detail (Contract 2 error shape) when status is failed/cancelled/timeout; null on success.

started_at.description: RFC 3339 UTC timestamp (millisecond precision) when execution started.

completed_at.description: RFC 3339 UTC timestamp (millisecond precision) when execution finished.

duration_ms.description: Total wall-clock execution time in milliseconds.

tokens_used.description: Total LLM tokens consumed across all steps.

cost_usd.description: Total cost in USD, computed by the LLMs gateway from per-provider token pricing. REQUIRED on completed responses.

task_steps.description: Ordered per-step execution trace. REQUIRED on completed responses.

step.description: Step name, e.g. guardrail_check_input, llm_call, guardrail_check_output.

status.description: Step outcome. A tool timeout surfaces here as `timeout`, not `failed`.

tokens.description: Tokens consumed by this step (optional; present for llm_call steps).

trace_id.description: UUID v4 distributed-trace identifier (Contract 8), echoing the request.
